stories.headline: Google Unveils Eighth-Generation TPU Chips Designed for the Agentic Era
stories.key_takeaway: Google split its eighth-generation TPU into two purpose-built chips -- TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference -- marking its most aggressive bid to reshape AI infrastructure economics for the agentic era.

pull_quote.text: The number of transactions is going way up, and the cost per transaction needs to go way down for it to scale.

stories.headline: Merck and Google Cloud Forge Up to $1 Billion Agentic AI Partnership
stories.key_takeaway: Merck is investing up to $1 billion over at least a decade with Google Cloud to deploy Gemini Enterprise agentic AI across its entire 75,000-person workforce.

pull_quote.text: Merck is not just optimizing business processes; it is building a future where the speed of AI and the expertise of human ingenuity come together to bring drugs to patients faster.

stories.headline: SpaceX Secures Right to Acquire AI Coding Startup Cursor for Up to $60 Billion
stories.key_takeaway: SpaceX secured a binary option to either acquire Cursor for $60B after its summer IPO or pay $10B for ongoing collaboration.

stories.headline: Google Cloud Launches $750 Million Fund to Accelerate Consulting AI Adoption
stories.key_takeaway: Google Cloud committed $750M to fund consulting firms in deploying agentic AI, the largest single partner investment from any hyperscaler.

pull_quote.text: Models are now being asked to do tasks, to use tools, to have skills and to be able to do tasks on behalf of users.

stories.headline: Blue Energy Raises $380 Million to Build Nuclear Power Plants for AI Data Centers
stories.key_takeaway: MIT spinout Blue Energy raised $380M to build prefabricated 1.5 GW nuclear reactors in shipyards, targeting 48-month deployment.

pull_quote.text: This is the crux of the issue with nuclear. It is not the technology; it is how do we get the construction costs and the construction schedule down.

stories.headline: EVAS Intelligence Raises $211 Million Series B to Scale RISC-V Chips for AI Training
stories.key_takeaway: Beijing-based EVAS Intelligence closed a $211M Series B to mass-produce RISC-V AI training chips as China bets on open-source silicon.

stories.headline: Mistral AI Releases Large 3 With Improved Function Calling and EU Data Residency
stories.key_takeaway: Mistral Large 3 combines 675B-parameter open-weight performance with native EU data residency and aggressive API pricing.

stories.headline: OpenAI Makes o3-mini the Default Reasoning Model and Introduces Flex Compute Pricing
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI replaced o1-mini with o3-mini as the default reasoning model for ChatGPT Plus, tripling rate limits to 150 messages/day.

stories.headline: OpenAI Launches GPT-Rosalind as Research Preview for Scientific Reasoning
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI launched its first domain-specific life sciences model with 50+ scientific tool integrations and partnerships with Amgen, Moderna, and Novo Nordisk.

stories.headline: Cloudflare Wraps Agents Week With New Compute, Security, and Agent Toolbox

stories.headline: Google Brings Gemini-Powered Auto Browse to Chrome for Enterprise Task Automation
stories.key_takeaway: Google is repositioning Chrome as an AI workplace platform with Auto Browse at $6/user/month.

pull_quote.text: The new Gemini in Chrome is like having an assistant that helps you find information and get things done on the web easier than ever before.

stories.article_excerpt: Google is betting that the next great workplace productivity tool is not a new app but the browser window already open on every employees screen.

stories.key_takeaway: On the most demanding scientific benchmarks, the best AI agents complete just 20% of complex tasks versus 70% for human scientists.
